SettingsWindow.Title: Settings
SettingsWindow.EnableChat: Enable the lobby chat (no text filtering)
SettingsWindow.ShowNavigationButtons: Show multiplayer buttons on the navigation panel
SettingsWindow.EnableShortcuts: Enable shortcuts to quickly open multiplayer tabs
SettingsWindow.FavGirlMode: Display fav girls instead of equipped combinations on the home page when enabled
SettingsWindow.ShowOtherElfins: Show elfins of other players on the home page
SettingsWindow.DisplayLobbyStatus: Display status of your lobby (Public or Private)
SettingsWindow.ShowBattlePopups: Show popups when someone loses AP/FC or misses
SettingsWindow.EnableLogging: Show log messages in the console
SettingsWindow.LobbyUpdateIntervalMS: How often will your lobby data update in milliseconds. Recommended values: 3000ms — 5000ms
SettingsWindow.BattleUpdateIntervalMS: How often will your battle data update in milliseconds. Recommended values: 300ms — 1000ms

SystemChatMessages.NoArguments: This command requires arguments to be executed.
SystemChatMessages.ChatPlaceholderText: Press / or click here to start typing

CommandDescriptions.mute: Hide all messages from a player
CommandDescriptions.unmute: Unhide all messages from a player

Warning.Title: Warning
Warning.NoAccount: You are not logged into your Muse Dash account! Please log in to play multiplayer.
Warning.Offline: Couldn't connect to the multiplayer server. Do you want to try again?
Warning.LostConnection: Connection with the multiplayer server was lost. Do you want to try to reconnect?
Warning.Outdated: Current mod version ({0}) is outdated. Would you like to update the mod? ({1})
Warning.NoInvites: Invites are not available at the moment. Please contact mod developers and let them know.
Warning.LoginRequired: Login is required to continue. Proceed to the authorization page?
Warning.NoInternet: You are offline. Connect to the internet to play multiplayer!

MainMenu.Title: Multiplayer
MainMenu.Description:
Welcome to the <color=f5428aff>Multiplayer</color>! ヽ(・∀・)ﾉ 

Here you can play against other players, customize your profile, earn achievements, add friends and more!

Click "Lobbies" to play with your friends or 
"Competitive" to play against random people.
MainMenu.LocalPlayerBanned: You have been banned from multiplayer servers. If you wish to appeal please contact @cvle. or @taypexx in discord.

ProfileWindow.Title: Profile
ProfileWindow.BioTooLong: Your bio must not be longer than {0} characters!
ProfileWindow.DecideUnfriendPrompt: Are you sure you want to unfriend this person?
ProfileWindow.EmptyFriends: This person doesn't have friends. Maybe you could be their first one... (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)
ProfileWindow.EmptyFriendsLocal: You don't have friends... yet (╥ ᴗ ╥)
ProfileWindow.EmptyFriendRequests:
Nobody has sent you any friend requests.

Do it yourself! ( • ̀ω•́ )੭ ✧´-
ProfileWindow.EmptyAchievements:
You didn't achieve anything.

Keep playing! (•̀ ᴗ -˵)
ProfileWindow.EmptyAchievementsLocal:
This person didn't achieve anything.

But they are trying! (•̀ ᴗ -˵)

Achievements.Title: Achievements
Achievements.Welcome!: Launch the multiplayer for the first time.
Achievements.Autoplay.dll: Reach the top rank in the multiplayer.

PnlPreparation.WebsiteOnly: Only website custom charts are allowed!

Lobbies.Title: Lobbies
Lobbies.Description:
<color=1eff00ff>Public</color> lobbies are open to everyone as long as they are not full.

<color=f5428aff>Private</color> lobbies require you to enter their name and password in order to join.

If you don't want to join someone's lobby you can create your own.
Lobbies.IncorrectID: Lobby with this ID doesn't exist!

PublicLobbies.Title: Public Lobbies
PublicLobbies.Description:
Pick the one you like the most.

 (^.^)
PublicLobbies.EmptyDescription:
There are no public lobbies available right now.

 〜(＞.＜)〜

LobbyCreation.Title: Create a lobby
LobbyCreation.Description:
<color=f5428aff>{0}</color>

[ Max Players ]: <color={1}>{2}</color>
[ Password ]: <color={3}>{4}</color>
[ Goal ]: <color={5}>{6}</color>
[ Charts ]: <color={7}>{8}</color>
[ Chart Selection Mode ]: <color={9}>{10}</color>
[ Playlist Size ]: <color={11}>{12}</color>
LobbyCreation.LobbyNameInvalid: Lobby name length must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.MaxPlayersInvalid: Maximum amount of players in lobby must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.PasswordInvalid: Password length must be between {0} and {1}!
LobbyCreation.GoalDescription: Define the condition under which players will be compared.
LobbyCreation.PlayTypeDescription: Define the range of charts everyone will be playing.
LobbyCreation.ChartSelectionDescription: Define the way charts are going to be queued and played.
LobbyCreation.PlaylistSizeInvalid: Playlist size must be between {0} and {1}!

Lobby.Title: Lobby
Lobby.LeavePrompt: Are you sure you want to leave this lobby?
Lobby.DisbandPrompt: Are you sure you want to disband this lobby? Everyone will be kicked.
Lobby.PlaylistDescription:
[ Playlist Size ]: <color={0}>{1}/{2}</color>

To add a chart to the playlist open it and click the corresponding button.

If anybody has a chart that they hided, no one will be able to add it to the playlist.
Lobby.ChartHidden: This chart was hidden by someone
Lobby.SleepwalkerUsedLocal: You must unequip sleepwalker to proceed
Lobby.NotHost: Only host can start the game
Lobby.IntermissionLabel: Coming up: <color=#{0}>{1}</color>   Top combo: <color=#{2}>{3} / {4}</color>   Time left: <color=#{5}>{6}s</color>
